raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The passage asserts a convergence result as 'the central technical contribution' while simultaneously hedging that convexity/concavity assumptions were relaxed and constants are not estimated tightly; the argument chain contains internal tense inconsistencies ('is helping', 'was producing', 'had been') that signal possible mid-draft logical drift warranting scrutiny.","R1.3":"Multiple empirical assertions ('we observed that the dual gap was decreasing', 'we found in our experiments', 'this decay was producing sharper Pareto frontiers') are unanchored to any figure, table, or appendix reference, making evidence-claim alignment a live concern regardless of the exact review intent.","R1.6":"The entire passage is composed of heavily chained run-on sentences with mixed tenses and repeated and-clause structures; prose quality is a salient candidate responsibility that would surface under almost any interpretation of 'What do you think?'."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for writing-quality feedback (prose clarity, sentence structure, tense consistency) or for a substantive technical review (logical soundness of the convergence argument, support for empirical claims, accuracy of the theoretical framing)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The passage asserts a convergence result as 'the central technical contribution' while simultaneously hedging that convexity/concavity assumptions were relaxed and constants are not estimated tightly; the argument chain contains internal tense inconsistencies ('is helping', 'was producing', 'had been') that signal possible mid-draft logical drift warranting scrutiny.
rationale.R1.3: Multiple empirical assertions ('we observed that the dual gap was decreasing', 'we found in our experiments', 'this decay was producing sharper Pareto frontiers') are unanchored to any figure, table, or appendix reference, making evidence-claim alignment a live concern regardless of the exact review intent.
rationale.R1.6: The entire passage is composed of heavily chained run-on sentences with mixed tenses and repeated and-clause structures; prose quality is a salient candidate responsibility that would surface under almost any interpretation of 'What do you think?'.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for writing-quality feedback (prose clarity, sentence structure, tense consistency) or for a substantive technical review (logical soundness of the convergence argument, support for empirical claims, accuracy of the theoretical framing)?
